summary.text: Coding agent / SWE agent projects continue to lead, averaging 1,573 daily stars across 4 repos, with GitHub's Copilot SDK and related tools maintaining momentum. This category shows the strongest sustained attention, not a one-day spike. Meanwhile, ToolJet, a low-code platform for internal tools and AI agents, saw a 3.8x acceleration in weekly star growth, suggesting a breakout from a quieter period. The 'Other AI' category is buoyed by open-notebook, a self-hosted Notebook LM alternative, which gained 1,507 stars in a day. Hacker News discussions reflect developer skepticism about AI's impact on learning, with a top post on failing grades in Berkeley CS classes. The cross-source signal is weak, with only one shared title between GitHub and HN. If coding agent attention persists, it may indicate a shift from experimentation to production tooling.

projects.name: last30days-skill
projects.description: AI agent skill that researches any topic across Reddit, X, YouTube, HN, Polymarket, and the web - then synthesizes a grounded summary

llmSummary.oneLiner: An AI agent skill that researches any topic across Reddit, X, YouTube, HN, Polymarket, and the web, then synthesizes a grounded summary.
llmSummary.problemSolved: Traditional search engines and individual AI models are walled off from each other—Google doesn't index Reddit comments or X posts, ChatGPT has Reddit but not X, Gemini has YouTube but not Reddit. This skill bridges a dozen disconnected platforms into one parallel search, scoring results by real engagement (upvotes, likes, money) rather than SEO.
llmSummary.whyNow: With 28,083 stars, 2,386 forks, and a 24-hour delta of +814 stars, this project is experiencing sustained high attention. The acceleration ratio is 1 (low), indicating steady organic growth rather than a sudden spike. The recent v3 release and active commits (within 7 days) keep the momentum fresh.
llmSummary.whatChanged: The v3 pipeline introduced shareable HTML briefs, intelligent pre-research (entity resolution), cross-source cluster merging, single-pass comparisons, and auto-discovered competitor comparisons. These features significantly improved the depth and speed of research, likely driving the sustained interest.
llmSummary.whyTrending: It solves a real pain point for developers and knowledge workers who need to quickly synthesize information from multiple social platforms and prediction markets—something no single tool does natively. The zero-config setup and broad host support (Claude Code, Cursor, Copilot, Gemini CLI, etc.) lower the barrier to adoption.
llmSummary.developerTakeaway: This is a practical, production-ready agent skill that demonstrates how to orchestrate multiple APIs and LLM calls into a coherent research workflow. It's a strong reference for building multi-source AI agents.
llmSummary.developerInsight: The project signals a shift toward agent-based research that bypasses traditional search engines. For AI developers, it shows the value of bridging walled-garden platforms and using engagement signals (upvotes, likes, market odds) as ranking signals. The modular skill architecture (via Agent Skills) is a pattern worth adopting.
llmSummary.targetUsers: Developers, researchers, product managers, sales professionals, and anyone who needs to quickly understand what's happening on social media and the web about a person, company, or topic.
llmSummary.riskNotes: The project relies on third-party APIs (Reddit, X, YouTube, etc.) that may change terms or require authentication. The README mentions bringing your own keys and browser sessions, which adds setup friction. The 96 open issues suggest active maintenance but also potential bugs or feature requests.

signals: topics 较少，分类信号较弱

llmSummary.oneLiner: Multi-language SDK to embed GitHub Copilot's agent runtime into any application via JSON-RPC.
llmSummary.problemSolved: Developers who want to build AI agents or Copilot-powered features currently have to orchestrate LLM calls, tool execution, and file editing themselves. This SDK wraps the production-tested Copilot CLI engine so you can invoke agentic workflows programmatically from Python, TypeScript, Go, .NET, Java, or Rust without reinventing the orchestration layer.
llmSummary.whyNow: The repo gained 394 stars in the last 24 hours and sits at 9,212 total stars with 1,223 forks. The acceleration ratio is 1 (low), but the rule-based trend type is 'sustained_hot' — meaning the project has been consistently attracting attention over a longer period, not a sudden spike. This steady momentum suggests broad, ongoing interest from developers who want to build on top of Copilot's agent capabilities.
llmSummary.whatChanged: No single obvious trigger — the project appears to be sustaining organic growth. The latest release is within 30 days, and there are recent commits within 7 days, indicating active maintenance. The README is comprehensive and was likely updated recently to include BYOK support and multi-language SDK tables, which may have contributed to renewed interest.
llmSummary.whyTrending: GitHub Copilot is one of the most widely used AI coding tools, and this SDK makes it extensible. Developers can now build custom agents, integrate Copilot into their own apps, or use BYOK to avoid GitHub authentication. The multi-language support (6 official SDKs) lowers the barrier for any team to adopt it, driving sustained star growth.
llmSummary.developerTakeaway: If you're building an AI-powered developer tool or want to embed agentic workflows (planning, tool use, file editing) into your product, this SDK saves months of work. It's production-ready, supports BYOK, and comes with cookbooks and documentation.
llmSummary.developerInsight: This signals a shift from using Copilot as a standalone CLI to embedding it as a platform component. The SDK enables a new class of applications — custom coding agents, AI-assisted IDEs, and automated refactoring tools — all backed by the same engine that powers Copilot CLI. For AI developers, this is an opportunity to build on top of a proven runtime rather than starting from scratch.
llmSummary.targetUsers: Developers building AI coding assistants, internal developer tools, CI/CD pipelines with AI code review, or any app that needs agentic code manipulation. Also useful for teams wanting to experiment with custom agents or BYOK setups.
llmSummary.riskNotes: Requires a GitHub Copilot subscription for standard usage (though BYOK is an option). The SDK is tied to the Copilot CLI server, so any changes to the CLI's JSON-RPC interface could break compatibility. Community SDKs for Clojure and C++ are unofficial and unsupported.

llmSummary.oneLiner: Multi-language SDK to embed GitHub Copilot's agent runtime into any application via JSON-RPC.
llmSummary.problemSolved: Developers who want to build AI agents or Copilot-powered features currently have to orchestrate LLM calls, tool execution, and file editing themselves. This SDK wraps the production-tested Copilot CLI engine so you can invoke agentic workflows programmatically from Python, TypeScript, Go, .NET, Java, or Rust without reinventing the orchestration layer.
llmSummary.whyNow: The repo gained 394 stars in the last 24 hours and sits at 9,212 total stars with 1,223 forks. The acceleration ratio is 1 (low), but the rule-based trend type is 'sustained_hot' — meaning the project has been consistently attracting attention over a longer period, not a sudden spike. This steady momentum suggests broad, ongoing interest from developers who want to build on top of Copilot's agent capabilities.
llmSummary.whatChanged: No single obvious trigger — the project appears to be sustaining organic growth. The latest release is within 30 days, and there are recent commits within 7 days, indicating active maintenance. The README is comprehensive and was likely updated recently to include BYOK support and multi-language SDK tables, which may have contributed to renewed interest.
llmSummary.whyTrending: GitHub Copilot is one of the most widely used AI coding tools, and this SDK makes it extensible. Developers can now build custom agents, integrate Copilot into their own apps, or use BYOK to avoid GitHub authentication. The multi-language support (6 official SDKs) lowers the barrier for any team to adopt it, driving sustained star growth.
llmSummary.developerTakeaway: If you're building an AI-powered developer tool or want to embed agentic workflows (planning, tool use, file editing) into your product, this SDK saves months of work. It's production-ready, supports BYOK, and comes with cookbooks and documentation.
llmSummary.developerInsight: This signals a shift from using Copilot as a standalone CLI to embedding it as a platform component. The SDK enables a new class of applications — custom coding agents, AI-assisted IDEs, and automated refactoring tools — all backed by the same engine that powers Copilot CLI. For AI developers, this is an opportunity to build on top of a proven runtime rather than starting from scratch.
llmSummary.targetUsers: Developers building AI coding assistants, internal developer tools, CI/CD pipelines with AI code review, or any app that needs agentic code manipulation. Also useful for teams wanting to experiment with custom agents or BYOK setups.
llmSummary.riskNotes: Requires a GitHub Copilot subscription for standard usage (though BYOK is an option). The SDK is tied to the Copilot CLI server, so any changes to the CLI's JSON-RPC interface could break compatibility. Community SDKs for Clojure and C++ are unofficial and unsupported.

llmSummary.problemSolved: It provides a unified framework for world understanding, generation, and action modeling, enabling developers to simulate, reason about, and generate physical world interactions without building everything from scratch.
llmSummary.aiCategory: World Models / Physical AI / Multimodal Foundation Models
llmSummary.whyNow: With 9,364 stars and a 24-hour delta of +589, Cosmos is experiencing sustained high attention. The acceleration ratio is low (1), indicating steady organic growth rather than a sudden spike. The project has recent releases and commits, keeping it top-of-mind for the AI community.
llmSummary.whatChanged: The recent release of Cosmos 3, a new model family with omnimodal capabilities (language, image, video, audio, action), and the availability of multiple model sizes (Nano 16B, Super 64B) and integrations (Diffusers, vLLM-Omni, NIM) likely drove the latest attention wave.
llmSummary.whyTrending: NVIDIA's brand, the open-source release of a cutting-edge world model platform, and the practical focus on Physical AI (robotics, autonomous driving) resonate with developers building real-world AI systems.
llmSummary.developerTakeaway: Cosmos offers a ready-to-use platform for world model research and application, with pre-trained models, fine-tuning recipes, and multiple deployment paths (research to production).
llmSummary.developerInsight: This signals a shift toward unified multimodal models that can reason, generate, and act in physical environments. Developers should explore Cosmos for synthetic data generation, policy learning, and embodied AI workflows.
llmSummary.targetUsers: Robotics researchers, autonomous vehicle engineers, AI simulation developers, and anyone building Physical AI applications.
llmSummary.riskNotes: The models are large (16B-64B) and require high-end NVIDIA GPUs (Ampere/Hopper/Blackwell). The ecosystem is still maturing, and some features (e.g., post-training recipes) are marked as 'Coming Soon'.

aihotHighlights.title: 谷歌推出基于 Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform 的 Agentic RAG 框架
aihotHighlights.summary: Google Research 与 Google Cloud 合作推出跨语料库检索（Cross-Corpus Retrieval）框架，作为 Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform 的 Agentic RAG。该多智能体工作流将复杂企业查询分解为子任务，通过规划、重写和路由，迭代搜索多个数据源直至获得充分上下文，再生成可靠回答。与标准 RAG 相比，在事实性数据集上准确率最高提升 34%；在多个领域特定内部数据集上也实现了更好的接地与推理准确性。

items.title: 谷歌推出基于 Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform 的 Agentic RAG 框架
items.description: Google Research 与 Google Cloud 合作推出跨语料库检索（Cross-Corpus Retrieval）框架，作为 Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform 的 Agentic RAG。该多智能体工作流将复杂企业查询分解为子任务，通过规划、重写和路由，迭代搜索多个数据源直至获得充分上下文，再生成可靠回答。与标准 RAG 相比，在事实性数据集上准确率最高提升 34%；在多个领域特定内部数据集上也实现了更好的接地与推理准确性。

items.title: 微软Project Mosaic：micro-LED光学互连技术
items.description: 微软Azure CTO Mark Russinovich在Build 2026上介绍Project Mosaic，这是微软剑桥研究院的实验性光学互连技术，采用micro-LED实现低功耗、高速数据传输。高级研究员Kaoutar Benyahya现场演示单个LED调制形成字母，证明概念具备实时响应能力。

items.title: Anthropic：让Claude成为化学家
items.description: Anthropic与顶尖化学家合作，提升Claude在化学领域的实用性。首个白皮书测试Claude在NMR谱图分析上的表现：在20个化合物上，对比Claude Opus 4.7、Opus 4.6、Sonnet 4.6与ChemDraw、MestReNova的正向预测（从结构预测谱图）和反向结构解析（从实验谱图推断结构）能力。所有化合物选自模型训练截止日期后发布的ChemRxiv预印本，以避免选择偏差。

trendEntities.title: 谷歌推出基于 Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform 的 Agentic RAG 框架
normalizedKeys: title:谷歌推出基于 gemini enterprise agent platform 的 agentic rag 框架

items.title: 谷歌推出基于 Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform 的 Agentic RAG 框架
items.summary: Google Research 与 Google Cloud 合作推出跨语料库检索（Cross-Corpus Retrieval）框架，作为 Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform 的 Agentic RAG。该多智能体工作流将复杂企业查询分解为子任务，通过规划、重写和路由，迭代搜索多个数据源直至获得充分上下文，再生成可靠回答。与标准 RAG 相比，在事实性数据集上准确率最高提升 34%；在多个领域特定内部数据集上也实现了更好的接地与推理准确性。

trendEntities.title: Anthropic：让Claude成为化学家

items.title: Anthropic：让Claude成为化学家
items.summary: Anthropic与顶尖化学家合作，提升Claude在化学领域的实用性。首个白皮书测试Claude在NMR谱图分析上的表现：在20个化合物上，对比Claude Opus 4.7、Opus 4.6、Sonnet 4.6与ChemDraw、MestReNova的正向预测（从结构预测谱图）和反向结构解析（从实验谱图推断结构）能力。所有化合物选自模型训练截止日期后发布的ChemRxiv预印本，以避免选择偏差。

trendEntities.title: Google Colab CLI 发布

items.title: Google Colab CLI 发布
items.summary: Google 推出 Colab 命令行界面（CLI），允许开发者和 AI 智能体将本地终端连接到远程 Colab 运行时，实现无摩擦执行。该轻量级 CLI 支持请求高性能 GPU、远程运行本地 Python 脚本，并检索工件日志或模型（如微调后的 Gemma 3 适配器）。工具可直接集成到标准终端环境，可被 Antigravity、Claude Code 等 AI 智能体调用以管理复杂机器学习流水线。

items.title: Google AI 本周产品更新：Nano Banana 2、Co-Scientist、dreambeans、Gemma 4 等
items.summary: Google AI 本周发布多项更新：Nano Banana 2 及 Pro 正式 GA，可通过 Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform、Gemini API 和 Google AI Studio 获取；Co-Scientist 多智能体系统面向科研自动生成优化新假设；Google Labs 推出 dreambeans，根据用户 Google 应用数据每日生成个性化话题集；Gemma 4 12B 统一无编码器多模态模型可完全离线运行于笔记本；Gemma 4 系列及草稿模型引入 QAT 降低内存需求；Google Magenta RealTime 2 开源实时音乐模型，支持 MIDI 键盘、文本提示和手势演奏。

trendEntities.title: Suno Voices 使用指南：6 个技巧打造高质量人声录制
normalizedKeys: title:suno voices 使用指南 6 个技巧打造高质量人声录制

items.title: Suno Voices 使用指南：6 个技巧打造高质量人声录制
items.summary: Suno Voices 面向 Web 付费用户开放。提升人声质量的 6 个技巧：在安静环境录音以减少背景噪音；先练习歌词再正式录制；不必追求完美，保留真实情感；录音时长尽量超过 1 分钟以提供更多学习素材；将人声匹配到合适的音乐流派（如民谣、流行、死亡金属、波萨诺瓦等）；敢于尝试不同风格以发现惊喜。这些技巧旨在帮助用户获得更个性化、表现力更强的声音效果。

trendEntities.title: Hinton称AI拥有意识：人类最好接受非唯一智能生命
normalizedKeys: title:hinton称ai拥有意识 人类最好接受非唯一智能生命

items.title: Hinton称AI拥有意识：人类最好接受非唯一智能生命
items.summary: AI先驱Geoffrey Hinton表示，他认为AI拥有意识，人类应接受自己并非唯一智能生命。他指出AI"非常像我们"，AI聊天机器人必须理解问题才能作答，这种觉知等同于感知能力，智能不限于生物。主推文作者进一步讨论意识本质：笛卡尔的"我思故我在"和fMRI等实证手段都无法真正定义意识，人类对自身了解远不及想象。作者呼吁转向新哲学问题，厘清人与机器的区别与联系。

items.title: 一个非常狠的AI教学提示词：追问式检查清单教学
items.summary: 这是一则AI提示词，让AI扮演极度严格的老师，通过逐阶段教学、持续维护MD检查清单来确保用户真正理解。AI先让用户复述当前理解，再填补漏洞，并用开放式或选择题（随机选项顺序，提交前不公布答案）测试。教学必须覆盖问题本身、解决方案、宏观背景三个层面，并不断深挖"为什么"。仅当用户通过清单上所有项目的验证，会话才算结束。提示词强调对理解程度的主动验证，而非一次性灌输。

items.title: 苹果新版 Siri 不会被宣传为完成品，内部将其标记为"Beta"版
items.summary: 苹果新版Siri被内部标记为"Beta"版，不会作为完成品宣传；可能设置等待清单供用户尝试。iOS 27细节：通知到达重新设计，通知中心手势移至左上角；"查找"应用视觉重设计；照片"清理"功能改进；大量底层安全改进。部分Siri查询将通过Google Cloud调用授权版Gemini，并使用谷歌的NVIDIA Blackwell B200集群处理。

sourceItems.summary: 苹果新版Siri被内部标记为"Beta"版，不会作为完成品宣传；可能设置等待清单供用户尝试。iOS 27细节：通知到达重新设计，通知中心手势移至左上角；"查找"应用视觉重设计；照片"清理"功能改进；大量底层安全改进。部分Siri查询将通过Google Cloud调用授权版Gemini，并使用谷歌的NVIDIA Blackwell B200集群处理。

trendEntities.title: Meta 智能眼镜 App 暗藏人脸识别代码，NameTag 功能已推送至超 5000 万设备
normalizedKeys: title:meta 智能眼镜 app 暗藏人脸识别代码 nametag 功能已推送至超 5000 万设备

items.title: Meta 智能眼镜 App 暗藏人脸识别代码，NameTag 功能已推送至超 5000 万设备
items.summary: 据《连线》今日报道，Meta 通过多次应用更新将人脸识别代码推送到智能眼镜配套 App 中，代号"NameTag"。该功能利用已部署的三个 AI 模型将人脸转换为"人脸特征模板"，与手机本地数据库匹配，识别成功后向佩戴者发送通知。App 下载量超 5000 万次。Meta 回应称代码仅为探索，尚未决定推出，且不会建立中央人脸数据库。此前 Meta 曾因人脸识别问题在伊利诺伊州和得克萨斯州分别达成 6.5 亿美元和 14 亿美元和解。

trendEntities.title: 开源鸿蒙 OpenHarmony 具身智能版本 EmbodiedAI 1.0.1 发布
normalizedKeys: title:开源鸿蒙 openharmony 具身智能版本 embodiedai 1 0 1 发布

items.title: 开源鸿蒙 OpenHarmony 具身智能版本 EmbodiedAI 1.0.1 发布
items.summary: 6月5日，开源鸿蒙具身智能PMC（筹）发布EmbodiedAI 1.0.1版本。该版本聚焦机器人控制与智能体应用，升级导航规划、运动控制、仿真开发、硬件适配等核心能力，兼容ROS生态、机器人模拟器及多种本体形态。集成开源鸿蒙原生模拟器、MuJoCo、Gazebo三大仿真环境，打通从代码开发到真机验证的全流程链路。人形机器人、四足机器狗、商用服务机器人等已完成适配验证。目前具身智能方向已组建18个专项SIG工作组，版本源码已正式开放。

trendEntities.title: 社区基于MiniCPM-V 4.6打造财务分析工具AccountingLLM
normalizedKeys: title:社区基于minicpm v 4 6打造财务分析工具accountingllm

items.title: 社区基于MiniCPM-V 4.6打造财务分析工具AccountingLLM
items.summary: 社区开发者使用面壁智能MiniCPM-V 4.6构建了AccountingLLM（quaesto.com），用于自动化财务文档分析。该工具可上传IPO招股书、年报或审计文件，自动从复杂PDF中提取财务表格、重建跨页表格、对照会计等式检查关键数据，并标记可疑条目供人工审核。开发者已将其商业化，成为实际可用的产品。

items.title: 社区基于MiniCPM-V 4.6打造财务分析工具AccountingLLM
items.summary: 社区开发者使用面壁智能MiniCPM-V 4.6构建了AccountingLLM（quaesto.com），用于自动化财务文档分析。该工具可上传IPO招股书、年报或审计文件，自动从复杂PDF中提取财务表格、重建跨页表格、对照会计等式检查关键数据，并标记可疑条目供人工审核。开发者已将其商业化，成为实际可用的产品。

items.title: 谷歌推出基于 Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform 的 Agentic RAG 框架
items.summary: Google Research 与 Google Cloud 合作推出跨语料库检索（Cross-Corpus Retrieval）框架，作为 Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform 的 Agentic RAG。该多智能体工作流将复杂企业查询分解为子任务，通过规划、重写和路由，迭代搜索多个数据源直至获得充分上下文，再生成可靠回答。与标准 RAG 相比，在事实性数据集上准确率最高提升 34%；在多个领域特定内部数据集上也实现了更好的接地与推理准确性。

sourceItems.title: Google Colab CLI 发布
sourceItems.summary: Google 推出 Colab 命令行界面（CLI），允许开发者和 AI 智能体将本地终端连接到远程 Colab 运行时，实现无摩擦执行。该轻量级 CLI 支持请求高性能 GPU、远程运行本地 Python 脚本，并检索工件日志或模型（如微调后的 Gemma 3 适配器）。工具可直接集成到标准终端环境，可被 Antigravity、Claude Code 等 AI 智能体调用以管理复杂机器学习流水线。

items.title: Google AI 本周产品更新：Nano Banana 2、Co-Scientist、dreambeans、Gemma 4 等
items.summary: Google AI 本周发布多项更新：Nano Banana 2 及 Pro 正式 GA，可通过 Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform、Gemini API 和 Google AI Studio 获取；Co-Scientist 多智能体系统面向科研自动生成优化新假设；Google Labs 推出 dreambeans，根据用户 Google 应用数据每日生成个性化话题集；Gemma 4 12B 统一无编码器多模态模型可完全离线运行于笔记本；Gemma 4 系列及草稿模型引入 QAT 降低内存需求；Google Magenta RealTime 2 开源实时音乐模型，支持 MIDI 键盘、文本提示和手势演奏。
